title: refactor(packages-mcp): remove dead helpers, fix broken import, dedupe request prep
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the MCP
gist.blurb: We swept out some dead code and tightened up the MCP package's internal wiring. A cleaner codebase means faster updates down the line!
gist.summary: Refactored the MCP package to remove unused helpers like createToolDefinition, fix a broken getPricing import, and deduplicate request preparation logic.
gist.impact: Developers working on the MCP server will benefit from a cleaner, more maintainable codebase with 80 fewer lines of redundant code.
